title: BAL tops Chambers Global Guide 2026 with Band 1 ranking in Immigration: Business, Partners Jeff Joseph and Lynden Melmed recognized | BAL Immigration Law
content:
BAL is proud to share leading rankings in the 2026 edition of the Chambers Global Guide.
Continuing a streak of top distinctions, BAL ranked Band 1 in Immigration: Business as a highly recommended law firm by in-house counsel, third-party experts and private practice attorneys. Additionally, Partners Jeff Joseph and Lynden Melmed were recognized as Band 2 practitioners in the category, praised respectively for “substantial experience in immigration-related litigation on a national basis” and for “handling federal government immigration investigations and internal audits on behalf of clients.”
Chambers also ranked BAL as Band 2 in Immigration: Global , recognizing the firm’s practice for its “deep experience in corporate global mobility” and “on-the-ground expertise in more than 135 countries” through its global partnerships.
“Our consistent recognition in Chambers Global is evidence of BAL’s quality of work and exceptional client service offered on a global scale,” said Managing Partner Frieda Garcia. “We know how committed we are as a firm to deliver the best immigration solutions in the industry, and our clients and peers acknowledge that commitment too.”
Chambers’ rankings are based on independent, thorough research of the legal market and client feedback. Chambers Global showcases the top lawyers and law firms in over 200 jurisdictions around the world.
